global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body and predominantly white plumage. It features a short, rounded head with a small black beak and dark eyes. The wings are long and pointed, while the tail is short and squared. The legs are short and black.

part_details.head: Rounded, covered in white feathers, with a small black beak and dark eyes.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, and pointed, covered in white feathers.

spatial_relations: The wings extend laterally from the body.
The tail is positioned at the rear end of the body.
The head is at the front of the body, with the beak protruding forward.
